rationale: Review 2's finding about unused `open TensorProduct` is clearly verifiable from the diff (no tensor-product identifiers appear after line 53), and its missing-import claim — while unverifiable from the diff alone — addresses the more fundamental placement issue of a new file being disconnected from the library hierarchy; both fixes together produce a cleaner, more correctly placed PR than Review 1's narrower suggestion to make one internal lemma private.
